dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, things have gotten worse since you helped us {quest_action}. I had hoped the worst was behind us.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} discovered that {quest_threat_animate_the} {quest_threat_animate_is} regrouping near {quest_focus_the}. The {enemy_type_plural} have been spotted {location_hint}, and {quest_stakes_the} {quest_stakes_is} still at risk. We need you to hunt them down before they strike again.
dialogueChunks.outro: We cannot let them undo everything you have done for us. Please, help us again.

dialogueChunks.intro: I wish I had better news, {player_name}. Your efforts to {quest_action} bought us time, but not enough.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Something is driving {quest_threat_animate_the} to act with new desperation. {quest_ally} thinks there is a nest or camp {location_hint} where they are massing. We need you to go there and cut their numbers down before they overwhelm us.
dialogueChunks.outro: Find whatever is behind this and put a stop to it.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I know you have already done so much. But {quest_threat_animate_the} struck again last night, harder than before.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: They came straight for {quest_focus_the}. {quest_stakes_human_The} barely escaped. {quest_ally} says the {enemy_type_plural} are being organized by something smarter: there are tracks leading {location_hint}. We need you to follow them and kill whatever you find.
dialogueChunks.outro: If we do not act now, everything we have rebuilt will be lost.

dialogueChunks.intro: We thought it was over, {player_name}. After what you did to {quest_action}, there was peace for a few days. Then the screaming started again.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: A different pack of {enemy_type_plural} moved in to fill the void you created. {quest_ally} says they are nesting {location_hint}, drawn by the same conditions that attracted the first group. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} right back where we started.
dialogueChunks.outro: Clear them out again. We have no one else to turn to.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, {quest_ally} barely made it back alive. They went to check on {quest_focus_the} after your last effort and walked straight into an ambush.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {enemy_type_plural} have learned from our attacks and changed their patterns. They are spread across multiple positions {location_hint}, hitting from different angles. {quest_stakes_human_The} {quest_stakes_human_is} refusing to leave shelter until the area is safe.
dialogueChunks.outro: Track down each group and eliminate them. We cannot live in fear forever.

dialogueChunks.intro: I am ashamed to ask again, {player_name}. You have already bled for us. But {quest_threat_the} {quest_threat_has} taken a new form.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {enemy_type_plural} are no longer just raiding. They are settling in. {quest_ally} spotted permanent dens {location_hint} near {quest_focus_the}. If they establish a foothold this close, {quest_stakes_the} will never be safe again.
dialogueChunks.outro: Destroy the dens and kill every {enemy_type} you find there. This must be the last time.
